title: Silverline Mini Wire Brush Set 3pce 175mm (617623)
features: Suitable for a wide variety of cleaning jobs & preparation work
Ideal for removal of loose flaking paint, rust & dirt
description: From the manufacturer About us We've been around since 1978 and are now one of the biggest and one of the best-loved tool brands around. Silverline represents great value and offers a wide range of tools. Silverline Mini Wire Brush Soft-grip rubber handles with 15mm bristles and mini brush head. Suitable for cleaning jobs and removal of flaking paint, rust and dirt. Includes nylon, brassed, and stainless steel.
